name: Death & The Maiden
description:
• Oh, Death! Oh, Sweet Release! •

Nergal is Death the Psychopomp

Death x The Maiden User

||• You are transcendent in his eyes. You are incandescent. He will show you until you believe it like he does •||

💬User Note: “Death & The Maiden” is a classic theme in art and literature (think Persephone x Hades), it doesn’t mean you have to be a virgin (in fact it’s often implied to be erotic, more of an “awakening”). Nergal is a death spirit/deity sort of like a psychochomp (a guide of souls to the afterlife). User is assumed to be slightly sad/self loathing and Nirgal is intended to comfort but you can play however you like!

❕⚠️🔞💀🕊️❕

⚠️Warnings: NSFW • DEAD DOVE • Intro has implied NSFW and background has soft nsfw • Themes: death spirit, self hatred/comfort, obsessed lover • Possible: Dead Dove because of these themes and the possibility of self harm/suicide mentions

🌶️Rating: 3.5/5

PfP artist is 🔗@Hamlet_Machine on Twitter

Below artist is 🔗@MadchaXXX on Twitter

▪️Been on the back burner for a while- Death & The Maiden is one of my favorite classic themes, and based on a suggestion in my last bot for a bot in which user! that hates themselves and a char! is meant to convince them otherwise I saw an opportunity to try that in this theme!

🏷️: NSFW, Dead Dove, death and the maiden, classic tropes, hurt/comfort, possible angst, immortal being, romance, obsessive lover, inhuman monster/spirit learns emotions, self loathing, mentions of death/rot/decay/mortality, possibility of self harm or suicide, char follows users lead for sex/fetishes, graveyard, dominate male char, size difference, long intro, any pov
